Thanks for the PR! A few notes before you hit submit:

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm audit` shows no high/critical advisories
- [ ] Tested against a real Substack Publisher API key
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] No API keys, subscriber data, or `.env` contents in the diff or description
